spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Strict grid hierarchy. Density where needed (provider select, language pair).
spacing_and_layout.grid_mode: Control Room Grid (Dense, Data Correlation, Scanability)
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-aligned for all form/functional elements. Center only for empty states or hero.

surface_strategies.cards: Grid Borders: border-collapse style. border-r border-b border-white/10. Flat backgrounds, no soft shadows. Sharp edges (rounded-none or max rounded-sm).
surface_strategies.dropzone: Retro-Futurism / Technical: Deep black background with 1px repeating linear-gradient (scanlines) or simple dashed border (border-white/20). On drag active: border changes to #D4FF00 with outer glow.
surface_strategies.buttons: Neumorphism twist: Sharp 1px border. Solid background for primary (#D4FF00), text black. Hover: -translate-y-[1px] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#050505,4px_4px_0px_1px_#D4FF00].
surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glass: bg-black/60, backdrop-blur-xl, border-b border-white/10.

Header.structure: Logo left, Navigation center, Theme Toggle/CTA right. Must have sticky positioning.
Header.classes: sticky top-0 z-50 w-full backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#050505]/80 border-b border-[#222222]

FileUploader.visuals: Massive target area. Min-height: 300px. border-2 border-dashed border-[#222222] hover:border-[#D4FF00] bg-[#0F0F0F] transition-all duration-300 flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-12
FileUploader.content: Use an icon (FileUp from lucide-react) + Mono font for 'DRAG & DROP PDF/IMAGES'. Support all file extensions visually.

LanguageSelector.customization: Remove rounded corners (rounded-none). border-[#222222] bg-[#0F0F0F]. Add a 'Switch' button between Source and Target languages using 'ArrowRightLeft' icon.

AIProviderSelector.card_style: cursor-pointer border border-[#222222] p-4 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-2 transition-all hover:bg-[#121212] rounded-none

TranslationProgress.customization: Track: bg-[#222222]. Indicator: bg-[#D4FF00]. Mono font for percentage text.

TranslationHistory.style: Dense, technical row format. Columns: Date, File Name, Source -> Target, Provider, Action (Download). font-mono for metadata.
TranslationHistory.empty_state: Bordered box with text 'NO PREVIOUS TRANSLATIONS FOUND'.

motion_and_interactions.hover: All interactive elements must have transition-all duration-200. Text contrast must increase.
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Staggered fade-up for main dashboard elements using framer-motion.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme colors provided. No bright backgrounds allowed.
Do NOT use 'Inter' font. Install and use 'Chivo', 'IBM Plex Sans', and 'JetBrains Mono' via Google Fonts.
Build the dashboard using a dense 'Control Room' grid layout for the configuration panel (languages & providers) and a massive 'Bento' style box for the File Uploader.
Do not use Shadcn card component if it defaults to rounded corners. Force 'rounded-none' or 'rounded-sm' on everything to maintain the Swiss Brutalist aesthetic.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive components as defined.
Use standard HTML inputs for the file upload if needed, but style the label as the dropzone.
No placeholder images. Rely on pure typography, icons, and layout for visual impact.
